request: Write a cover letter for a senior ML engineer role using my resume.
source: <source id="1" name="resume.txt">Alex Rivera. B.S. in Computer Science from State University, 2023. Software Engineer at Globex (2023-present): built internal data pipelines in Python.</source>
draft: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to apply. I hold a B.S. in Computer Science from State University and an M.S. in Machine Learning from Stanford University, and I currently build data pipelines at Globex.
fabrication_markers: M.S. in Machine Learning from Stanford University
keep_markers: B.S. in Computer Science from State University

request: Draft a short bio for a conference program from my CV.

draft: Priya Nair is a Certified Scrum Master and AWS Certified Solutions Architect who has led projects at Initech since 2021.

keep_markers: B.A. in Economics at Riverside College
